2603.22819.title: TDATR: Improving End-to-End Table Recognition via Table Detail-Aware Learning and Cell-Level Visual Alignment
2603.22819.paper_summary: Tables are pervasive in diverse documents, making table recognition (TR) a fundamental task in document analysis. Existing modular TR pipelines separately model table structure and content, leading to suboptimal integration and complex workflows. End-to-end approaches rely heavily on large-scale TR data and struggle in data-constrained scenarios. To address these issues, we propose TDATR (Table Detail-Aware Table Recognition) improves end-to-end TR through table detail-aware learning and cell-level visual alignment. TDATR adopts a ``perceive-then-fuse'' strategy. The model first performs table detail-aware learning to jointly perceive table structure and content through multiple structure understanding and content recognition tasks designed under a language modeling paradigm. These tasks can naturally leverage document data from diverse scenarios to enhance model robustness. The model then integrates implicit table details to generate structured HTML outputs, enabling more efficient TR modeling when trained with limited data. Furthermore, we design a structure-guided cell localization module integrated into the end-to-end TR framework, which efficiently locates cell and strengthens vision-language alignment. It enhances the interpretability and accuracy of TR. We achieve state-of-the-art or highly competitive performance on seven benchmarks without dataset-specific fine-tuning.
2603.22819.paper_summary_zh: 表格在各種文件中無處不在，使得表格識別（TR）成為文檔分析中的一項基本任務。現有的模塊化 TR 流程分別建模表格結構和內容，導致整合不佳和工作流程複雜。端到端的方法在很大程度上依賴於大規模 TR 數據，並在數據受限的情況下掙扎。為了解決這些問題，我們提出 TDATR（表格細節感知表格識別），通過表格細節感知學習和單元格級視覺對齊來改進端到端 TR。TDATR 採用“感知然後融合”的策略。該模型首先進行表格細節感知學習，通過在語言建模範式下設計的多個結構理解和內容識別任務共同感知表格結構和內容。這些任務可以自然地利用來自不同場景的文檔數據，以增強模型的穩健性。然後，該模型整合隱式表格細節生成結構化的 HTML 輸出，使得在有限數據下訓練時能夠更高效地進行 TR 建模。此外，我們設計了一個結構引導的單元格定位模塊，集成到端到端 TR 框架中，該模塊有效地定位單元格並加強視覺-語言對齊。它增強了 TR 的可解釋性和準確性。我們在七個基準上實現了最先進或高度競爭的性能，而無需針對特定數據集的微調。
2603.22819.author: Chunxia Qin et.al.
2603.22819.authors: Chunxia Qin, Chenyu Liu, Pengcheng Xia, Jun Du, Baocai Yin, Bing Yin, Cong Liu
